Day 1
Hands-on training

Why Watson Brothers

Built for agents who
want to actually earn.

  • 50 / 50 Split — Forever
    No sliding scale, no cap to hit, no surprises. Half of every commission is yours from your first deal to your hundredth.
  • Real Leads, Not Promises
    We have an internal lead distribution system built for our team. Leads are assigned and tracked — you're not hunting cold lists on your own.
  • A Real Team Behind You
    You'll work alongside experienced agents who actually help. Alex and Nate are in the trenches with you — not just managing from a distance.
  • Momentum Realty Brand
    Established infrastructure, marketing support, and a brand that opens doors across Northeast Florida.

Open Territories

7 markets. All open.
Pick yours.

Each territory is managed by one or two dedicated agents. When a territory is assigned, the leads inside it flow to you automatically.

North Jax & NassauOpen
Jacksonville WestOpen
Jacksonville EastOpen
Intracoastal / BeachesOpen
Ponte Vedra / Nocatee / St. AugOpen
St. Johns CountyOpen
Clay CountyOpen

— Alex & Nate Watson, Watson Brothers Group
